dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Dear researchers of the Garden: Thank you all for attending this briefing on such short notice. Today, we are celebrating the fact that we have finally found our lost Butterfly.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In the past, we lost a precious Butterfly child in an unforeseen incident. But now, that child has safely returned to the Garden. This child standing right in front of you is the Fourth Butterfly.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His name is Maehwa Baek.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Hey, Maehwa!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Day and night, the Garden is striving tirelessly to exterminate the Bugs.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Haha, don't be nervous! You're doing great!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Oh, it's Sara. So she was over there.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But with each passing day, the growing Bug population is proving too much to handle for our Butterflies. And next to him is...

dialogue.speaker: DOCTOR SEO
dialogue.line: Good job, Maehwa.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Ah, Doctor Seo.

dialogue.speaker: DOCTOR SEO
dialogue.line: It must have been uncomfortable being on stage like that for the first time, but you handled it very well. Hehe.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: T-Thank you. But all I did was stand there.

dialogue.speaker: DOCTOR SEO
dialogue.line: Maehwa, you have no idea how relieved everyone was when they saw you return alive and well. All of us are hoping that in the future, you'll be a big help to us.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Ah. A big help?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Well, to be honest, I don't know if I can do that. I've lived such a normal life until now, so I don't really know anything. I'm not sure how useful I'll be.

dialogue.speaker: DOCTOR SEO
dialogue.line: You'll be fine. I know you will. You're going to be a huge help to us.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Uh...

dialogue.speaker: DOCTOR SEO
dialogue.line: Anyway, don't stress yourself out. Great job today, get some rest and I'll see you.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Ah, sure. See you later.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Maehwa, you did great!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Jeez! Sara?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Careful, Sara, you might fall over. She's like a child.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: I-I didn't fall over, so it's fine!

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Say hi, Maehwa! These are the researchers who work in the Guardhouse.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER
dialogue.line: Nice to meet you! We'll be the ones supporting you and the rest of the Butterflies from now on.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: H-Hello.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER
dialogue.line: Wow, we finally get to meet the Fourth Butterfly! You're so cute! How old are you?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: I'm 20 years old.

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Haha, he sure is popular. All right, now that you've met them, are you hungry?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: SARA
dialogue.line: Let's go and eat!

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHERS
dialogue.line: We're heading to work! See you later! Have a nice day!

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Whew, what a busy day. I was actually feeling pretty nervous earlier.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Is the dorm this way?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: It's a strange feeling though, laughing and talking to people other than Huina. It's been so long since I've done that. It doesn't even feel real. I've never felt so welcome before.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: I need to quickly catch up with the other Butterflies.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER A
dialogue.line: To be honest, I don't trust him. The Fourth Butterfly, I mean.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Huh? Are they talking about me?

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER A
dialogue.line: They keep telling us how he's a great addition to our manpower, but I just don't trust him.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER B
dialogue.line: Same here. I saw footage of him earlier where he lost control of his power and attacked the First Butterfly.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER A
dialogue.line: What if making them work together puts the other Butterflies in danger?

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER B
dialogue.line: Yeah, we wouldn't want the other Butterflies to get hurt because of him. How can he not even control his own power?

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER A
dialogue.line: There's never been a Butterfly like that before.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER B
dialogue.line: Plus, all the other Butterflies have been training since they were little. It's also suspicious that the Garden kept the very existence of the Fourth Butterfly a secret for so long. If there weren't any serious side effects or potential risks, why would they keep this to themselves and only tell us about him now? Doctor Seo and the other Directors must be hiding something. I'm not sure we should let that kid work as a Butterfly.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER A
dialogue.line: But we're desperate, so we don't really have a choice. All we can do is follow the Directors' orders.

dialogue.speaker: RESEARCHER B
dialogue.line: Come on, let's go or we'll be late.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: They're right. I don't know anything about myself. I don't know where I was born, or why I'm the only one like this. What if I go on a mission and lose control again like last time?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: In fact, it's not just the missions. What if I was attacked right now or cut myself by accident? Who knows what might happen? But I'm going to have to face situations like that from now on. If I mess up, will they abandon me? Would I have to go back? To an empty apartment without Huina, or anyone else? Avoiding people forever, and not fitting in anywhere. All alone.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: 'I know you will.'

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: 'You're going to be a huge help to us.'

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: That's right. I have nowhere to go and I can't go back now. So I'll just have to work extra hard to fit in here.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Huh? What's this? Where did all this mist come from?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Can it even get foggy in an indoor garden?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: I can barely see in front of me.

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: Is that... a Bug?

dialogue.speaker: MAEHWAL
dialogue.line: What the heck is a Bug doing in here?

summary: Maehwa Baek, the Fourth Butterfly, is formally introduced to the Garden's researchers, who express relief at his return. Despite Doctor Seo's encouragement, Maehwa overhears other researchers expressing distrust due to his past loss of control, leading him to resolve to work harder. The episode concludes with a mysterious fog appearing in the indoor garden, followed by the sudden appearance of a 'Bug'.
